import React from 'react'; import { Heart, Phone, Mail, MapPin, Facebook, Instagram, Twitter, Linkedin } from 'lucide-react'; import './Footer.css'; const Footer = () => { const currentYear = new Date().getFullYear(); const serviceLinks = [ { name: 'Wellness Monitoring', href: '#wellness' }, { name: 'Companionship Support', href: '#companionship' }, { name: 'Healthcare Coordination', href: '#healthcare' }, { name: 'Emergency Assistance', href: '#emergency' }, { name: 'Senior Support Services', href: '#support' }, ]; const quickLinks = [ { name: 'About Us', href: '#about' }, { name: 'How It Works', href: '#how-it-works' }, { name: 'Blogs', href: '#blogs' }, { name: 'FAQs', href: '#faqs' }, { name: 'Contact Us', href: '#contact' }, ]; const resourceLinks = [ { name: 'Senior Health Tips', href: '#health-tips' }, { name: 'Caregiver Guide', href: '#caregiver' }, { name: 'Safety at Home', href: '#safety' }, { name: 'Legal & Financial Planning', href: '#legal' }, ]; return (
{/* Brand Column */}
60PlusIndia

Supporting seniors to live independently with confidence, dignity, and care.

{/* Services Column */}

Our Services

    {serviceLinks.map((link) => (
  • {link.name}
    • ))}
{/* Quick Links Column */}

Quick Links

    {quickLinks.map((link) => (
  • {link.name}
    • ))}
{/* Resources + Contact Column */}

Resources

    {resourceLinks.map((link) => (
  • {link.name}
    • ))}
+91 98765 43210
care@60plusindia.com
New Delhi, India
{/* Bottom Bar */}

© {currentYear} 60PlusIndia. All rights reserved. Caring for seniors with love and respect.

Privacy Policy | Terms of Service | Accessibility
); }; export default Footer;
